016package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.controller;
017
018import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.exception.UserNotFoundException;
019import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.ManagerStatusUpdateRequest;
020import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.UserEnabledUpdateRequest;
021import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.UserProfile;
022import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.UserService;
023import java.util.List;
024import java.util.UUID;
025import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
026import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
027import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
028import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PatchMapping;
029import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
030import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;
031import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
032import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
033
034/**
035 * REST controller for manager-only user administration operations.
036 */
037@RestController
038@RequestMapping("/manager/users")
039public class ManagerUserController {
040
041  private final UserService service;
042
043  /**
044   * Creates a controller exposing manager-only user administration operations.
045   *
046   * @param service user service.
047   */
048  @Autowired
049  public ManagerUserController(UserService service) {
050    this.service = service;
051  }
052
053  /**
054   * Returns all user profiles.
055   *
056   * @return list of user profiles.
057   */
058  @GetMapping(produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)
059  public List<UserProfile> getAll() {
060    return service.getAll();
061  }
062
063  /**
064   * Returns a user profile by external identifier.
065   *
066   * @param externalId user external ID.
067   * @return user profile.
068   * @throws UserNotFoundException if no user exists with {@code externalId}.
069   */
070  @GetMapping(value = "/{externalId}", produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE)
071  public UserProfile get(@PathVariable UUID externalId) {
072    return service
073        .getByExternalId(externalId)
074        .orElseThrow(() -> new UserNotFoundException("User not found: " + externalId));
075  }
076
077  /**
078   * Sets manager status for a user profile.
079   *
080   * @param externalId user external ID.
081   * @param request request payload containing desired manager flag.
082   * @return updated user profile.
083   */
084  @PatchMapping(
085      value = "/{externalId}/manager-status",
086      consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE,
087      produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE
088  )
089  public UserProfile updateManagerStatus(
090      @PathVariable UUID externalId,
091      @RequestBody ManagerStatusUpdateRequest request
092  ) {
093    return service.setManagerStatus(externalId, request.isManager());
094  }
095
096  /**
097   * Sets enabled/disabled status for a user profile.
098   *
099   * @param externalId user external ID.
100   * @param request request payload containing desired enabled flag.
101   * @return updated user profile.
102   */
103  @PatchMapping(
104      value = "/{externalId}/enabled",
105      consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE,
106      produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE
107  )
108  public UserProfile updateEnabled(
109      @PathVariable UUID externalId,
110      @RequestBody UserEnabledUpdateRequest request
111  ) {
112    return service.setEnabled(externalId, request.isEnabled());
113  }
114
115}
116
